widget.name: Toast Notification
widget.description: This widget shows a toast notification to the user. It can be a success, warning, danger or info notification.

property.caption: Type
property.description: Enumeration attribute (success, warning, error, info) that determines the background color and default icon.

property.caption: Header
property.description: String attribute shown as the bold title of the toast.

property.caption: Body
property.description: Optional string attribute shown as the body text of the toast.

property.caption: Visible
property.description: Boolean attribute. The toast shows when true; the widget sets it back to false after dismiss.

property.caption: Auto-dismiss duration
property.description: Seconds before the toast auto-dismisses. Set to 0 to disable auto-dismiss.

property.caption: Swipe to dismiss
property.description: Enables the swipe gesture to dismiss (swipe up when position is top, swipe down when position is bottom).

property.caption: Position
property.description: Vertical anchor position of the toast on screen.

property.caption: Custom icon — success
property.description: Overrides the default success icon. Falls back to the built-in glyph when not set.

property.caption: Custom icon — warning
property.description: Overrides the default warning icon. Falls back to the built-in glyph when not set.

property.caption: Custom icon — error
property.description: Overrides the default error icon. Falls back to the built-in glyph when not set.

property.caption: Custom icon — info
property.description: Overrides the default info icon. Falls back to the built-in glyph when not set.

property.caption: On dismiss
property.description: Fires when the toast is dismissed for any reason (timer, swipe, or visible set to false externally).
